exercises.name: Seated One Arm Forearm Cable Curls
Seated One Arm Forearm Reverse Curls
Russian Twist
exercises.notes: Can be weighted. Focus on torso rotation, not just moving the hands.

exercises.name: Decline Russian Twist
exercises.notes: Decline bench increases mechanical tension on the rectus abdominis while twisting.

exercises.name: Preacher Dumbbell Wrist Curl
exercises.notes: Bench provides external stability for strict isolation of the flexors.

exercises.name: Preacher Dumbbell Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.notes: Bench provides external stability for strict isolation of the extensors.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.notes: Focus on posterior pelvic tilt (curling the pelvis up) rather than just flexing the hips.

exercises.name: Toes to Bar
exercises.notes: Requires lat strength to stabilize the swing. Great deep stretch for the lower abs.

exercises.name: Braced Single Arm Cable Pulldown
exercises.notes: Underhand/neutral grip with non-working hand bracing against a bench. Exceptional lat isolation.

exercises.name: Weighted Roman Chair Back Extension
exercises.notes: Use a barbell across shoulders or hold a plate/dumbbell. Focus on spinal extension/flexion for erectors, or keep spine rigid to bias glutes/hamstrings.
